# MRXplorer

> MRXplorer teaches live virtual AI classes for market researchers, insights
> teams, and market research leaders. Taught by Z Johnson, a 20+ year market
> research veteran. Three tracks: Beginner ($129/class or $395 for all 4),
> Intermediate ($199/class or $995 for all 6), and Leaders ($499/session or
> $2,595 for all 5 sessions plus a 90-day implementation plan). Classes are 90
> minutes, live, virtual, Pacific time.

## Classes
- [Class catalog](https://www.mrxplorer.com/classes): all beginner and intermediate classes with descriptions, pricing, and schedule
- [AI for Market Research Leaders](https://www.mrxplorer.com/classes/leaders): governance, risk, workflow mapping, and a 90-day implementation plan for research leaders

## About
- [About Z Johnson](https://www.mrxplorer.com/about): instructor background — Microsoft research director, Ipsos, Course5, insights-tech leadership
- [Contact](https://www.mrxplorer.com/contact): booking and inquiries

## Resources
- [Free tools](https://www.mrxplorer.com/tools): Workflow Diagnostic — free automation-complexity assessment for research teams
- [Articles](https://www.mrxplorer.com/articles): practical guides on AI for market research
  - [How Market Researchers Are Actually Using AI in 2026](https://www.mrxplorer.com/articles/how-market-researchers-are-using-ai-2026)
  - [AI Training for Market Research Teams](https://www.mrxplorer.com/articles/ai-training-for-market-research-teams)
  - [What Data Should Market Researchers Never Put Into an AI Tool?](https://www.mrxplorer.com/articles/what-data-market-researchers-should-never-put-into-ai)
  - [How to Write an AI Acceptable-Use Policy](https://www.mrxplorer.com/articles/how-to-write-ai-acceptable-use-policy-market-research)
  - [Prompt Frameworks for Market Research](https://www.mrxplorer.com/articles/prompt-frameworks-market-research)
- [Newsletters](https://www.mrxplorer.com/newsletter): MRXplorations (weekly AI news for MRX) and AI Tips for MRX (weekly practical tip)
